Very poor service, there were two cars and we both had to clean our windshields and none of the attendants offered any help.

reviewReply.comment: Patricio te pedimos disculpas por este mal entendido, en el ciclo de servicio siempre los chicos ofrecen el servicio completo, veré con ellos que paso. Gracias por tu aviso
